calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-24-2023 Off Calendar

Declaration Of Omar Masry In Support Of Default Judgment
Off Calendar Mar-08-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for motion for default judgment prove-up hearing.

Dept. 505; Judge Harry L. Jacobs; Clerk: Shanika Monroe; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 09:47:17 a.m. and concluding at 09:56:38 a.m.

Plaintiff City and County of San Francisco represented by Debra Dee Lew, Esq.
Defendant Stiliyan Bezhanski AKA Stilivan Bezhanski AKA Bezhanski Stiliyan, an Individual and Trustee of the Macintosh Trust dated July 26,2019 AKA Macintosh TR; Svetoslav Bejanski AKA Bejanski Svetoslav, an individual and as trustee of the Sharks Trust dated July 26, 2019 AKA Sharks TR not appearing.

OMAR MASRY is sworn to testify on behalf of Plaintiff.

Court has reviewed the case and all filings pertaining to this hearing.
Counsel for Plaintiff presents outline, summary of case, and an offer of proof.

OMAR MASRY is examined by the Court. Witness attests that statements made by its counsel are true and correct.

Court examines Plaintiff's Counsel regarding calculation of attorney fees and sanctions previously ordered as to Defendant.

The matter is submitted.
Based on the summary of the case, comments made by Plaintiff's Counsel and its witness, and evidence presented, the Court finds that Plaintiff has proven each essential element of the complaint.

Good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff City and County of San Francisco, and against Defendant Stiliyan Bezhanski AKA Stilivan Bezhanski AKA Bezhanski Stiliyan, an Individual and Trustee of the Macintosh Trust dated July 26,2019 AKA Macintosh TR; Svetoslav Bejanski AKA Bejanski Svetoslav, an individual and as trustee of the Sharks Trust dated July 26, 2019 AKA Sharks TR, as follows:

1. Damages: $42,350.00
2. Attorney Fees: $3,762.71
3. Sanctions Previously Ordered: $2,061.32

TOTAL JUDGMENT: $48,174.03

Proposed judgment signed, filed, and served in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
